landing.heroTitle: Controlled property collaboration for professional agents
landing.heroBody: Post a verified client requirement, receive matching properties from trusted agents, and present only the best to your client — with every step protected, permission-controlled and audited.

pillars.protectBody: Buyers and tenants never see the supplying agent. Co-broke partners never see your client.
pillars.controlBody: Only properties you approve reach your client, through a secure private presentation link.
pillars.auditBody: Declarations, commission agreements and negotiations are versioned and audited.

auth.resetSent: If an account exists for that email, a reset link has been sent.
auth.verifyBody: We have sent a confirmation link to your email address. Click the link in the email to activate your account, then sign in.

errors.weak_password: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.email_in_use: An account with this email may already exist.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Agent dashboard
dashboard.statusNote: Complete your agent verification to create requirements and submit properties.

verification.title: Agent verification
verification.intro: Provide your professional details and documents. An administrator will review your submission before you can create requirements or submit properties.
verification.submittedNotice: Submitted. Your verification is now under review.
verification.lockedNotice: Your submission is being processed. You will be notified when the review is complete.
verification.documentsHint: JPG, PNG, WebP or PDF, max 5 MB each. Stored privately; visible only to administrators.

errors.invalid_fields: Please check the highlighted fields and try again.
errors.missing_documents: Licence and identity documents are required.
errors.invalid_file_type: File type not allowed. Use JPG, PNG, WebP or PDF.
errors.file_too_large: A file exceeds the 5 MB limit.
errors.save_failed: Could not save. Please try again.
errors.not_allowed: Your current status does not allow submission.

errors.notes_required: Notes are required for this decision.

adminLegal.title: Legal content
adminLegal.intro: Versioned declarations and disclaimers. Publishing a new version keeps all previous versions and their consent records intact; future acceptances use the new wording. Final wording requires legal review per country before launch.
adminLegal.publishHint: This replaces the active version for the selected language. Previous versions are preserved and remain linked to their consent records.

errors.invalid: Please provide at least 50 characters of wording.
errors.save_failed: Could not publish. Please try again.

adminCountries.title: Countries & markets
adminCountries.intro: Activate markets and set their defaults. Terminology and licence fields per country are configured in the database and applied across forms.
adminCountries.saveFailed: Could not save. Please try again.

requests.title: My requests
requests.empty: No requirements yet. Create your first one.
requests.verifyFirst: Only verified agents can create requirements.
requests.submittedNotice: Submitted for admin approval. You will see the secure share link here once approved.

errors.invalid_fields: Please check the fields and try again.
errors.budget_range: Minimum budget cannot exceed maximum budget.
errors.save_failed: Could not save. Please try again.

link.title: Secure request link
link.pending: The secure share link appears here after admin approval.
link.shareHint: Share the URL, access code and QR with trusted agents. They must also sign in as verified agents before submitting a property.

form.title: Request title
form.preferredAreasHint: Comma-separated, e.g. Mont Kiara, Sri Hartamas
form.clientProfileHint: Shown to supplying agents. No names or contacts, e.g. “Malaysian retail operator expanding to Jakarta”
form.internalNotesHint: Private. Never shown to supplying agents.

decision.title: Decision
decision.expiryDays: Link validity (days, if no expiry set)

doneNotice.approve: Approved. Secure link generated and active.

errors.notes_required: Notes are required for this decision.
errors.wrong_status: This request is not awaiting review.

requestLink.invalidBody: This request link is invalid, disabled or has expired. Please contact the agent who shared it with you.
requestLink.gateBody: Enter the access code you received together with this link.
requestLink.wrongPassword: Incorrect access code. Please check and try again.
requestLink.lockedNotice: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
requestLink.loginToSubmit: To submit a matching property, sign in as a verified agent.
requestLink.verifyToSubmit: Your agent account must be verified before you can submit a property.
requestLink.submitComingSoon: Property submission opens in the next release. You will be able to submit matching properties for this requirement here.
